parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>Die <BIBL><TITLE>Mangoldische Bibel</TITLE> <YEAR>1729</YEAR></BIBL>. Die <BIBL><TITLE>Jelische Lexicon</TITLE> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stettlers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Schweitzer- Chronick</TITLE></BIBL>, das <BIBL><TITLE>Reich der Todten</TITLE></BIBL>, samt noch einigen anderen neuen frantz√∂sisch historischen B√ücheren, davon der Catalogus bey Herrn M. parsed.explanation: I fixed two XML-structure issues: (1) closed the third <BIBL> element immediately after <TITLE>Schweitzer- Chronick</TITLE> so it does not incorrectly absorb following text; (2) wrapped <TITLE>Reich der Todten</TITLE> in its own <BIBL> element, since TITLE tags should be contained in a bibliographic parent. The XML is now properly nested and well-formed.
